language_changed: Language changed. Restart the app to apply changes.
system_philosophy_subtitle: How the system names & explains progress
system_selection_hint: You can change philosophy anytime. It won't delete progress — only meaning and terminology changes.
reset_progress_message: This action will delete all hunter data and quests. Recovery will be impossible.
create_hunter_in_profile: Create a hunter on the "Profile" tab
get_daily_quests: Press the button below to get daily quests
no_api_key_message: Please configure API key in settings to generate quests with AI.
system_welcome:
Welcome, Hunter {name}.

I am the System. I will guide you on the path to power.

Complete quests, gain experience and become stronger.

Your current level: {level}
fail_quest_message: Mandatory quests apply penalties on failure.
penalty_quest_desc_1: Complete 100 squats (or an equivalent the System accepts). No excuses.
penalty_quest_desc_2: 30 minutes phone-free: work or training only. The System is watching.
penalty_quest_desc_3: Run/walk 2 km or 20 minutes brisk walking within 24 hours.
penalty_zone_applied_snack: Penalty Zone: XP debuff and a penalty quest were added.
penalty_zone_active_banner: Penalty Zone active: reduced XP. Complete the penalty quest.
focus_session_hint_closed: Session is locked. Cancel is disabled — keep focus until the timer ends to earn a bonus.
tribulation_desc: You reached a breakthrough threshold (level {level}). Solidify your foundation: complete a hard real-life task and lock in the result. Failure will trigger the Penalty Zone.
custom_system_subtitle: Rename core concepts and pick a rules preset. This affects terminology, AI style, and system priorities.
custom_rules_hint: Preset affects tone and preferences. Reward math stays safe (no sharp changes).
custom_ai_prompt_hint: Describe style briefly. Don't add keys/passwords. Limit: 500 chars.
custom_ai_idea_required: Enter a world idea to generate.
lore_solo: The System awakens the hunter in you. You grow quickly, but stay true to your goal: discipline turns routine into power.
lore_mage: In the Mage's Codex, reality is a language. You don't just complete tasks — you formulate runes and spells from your habits.
lore_cultivator: The Path of Cultivation demands patience. You strengthen the foundation through silence and trials, until growth becomes inevitable.
lore_custom: Your custom world is born from a grimoire. Tune the terms and principles — and the System will answer your style.
account_body: Sign-in is required so cloud sync can attach your backup to your account.
cloud_sync_need_account: To use cloud sync, you need to sign in.
cloud_sync_body:
Progress is stored on-device (Hive) only. Use JSON export/import in this section.

CloudSyncAdapter (lib/src/services/cloud_sync/) is implemented with Supabase Auth and the game_backups table; without dart-define flags the app stays local-only.
cloud_sync_need_dart_define: Built without Supabase: pass --dart-define=SUPABASE_URL and --dart-define=SUPABASE_ANON_KEY (see README). Local Hive + JSON still works.
cloud_sync_body_short: One progress snapshot per account in game_backups. Restore overwrites local data.
cloud_sync_sign_up_hint: Check your inbox: email confirmation may be required (Supabase Auth settings).
cloud_sync_pull_confirm_body: Local progress on this device will be replaced with cloud data.
manual_quest_ai_balance_failed: Could not balance the quest via AI — slider values were used.
quest_created_ai: Quest created (rewards approved by the System): {title}
blood_moon_active_banner: Anomaly «Blood Moon»: quest failure penalties are doubled and loot rolls skew higher. Ends when the System timer expires.
guild_locked_level: Guild unlocks at level {level}. Complete quests and grow.
guild_need_hunter: Create a hunter in the profile first.
guild_hub_subtitle: A hub for members, chat, raids and leaderboards (coming soon).
guild_hub_stub: This is a local hub for now. Next step: Supabase public profiles + Nick#1234 search.
guild_hub_next_body: Raids (shared goals), hall of fame, friend profiles, and multiverse classes.
morale_recovery_desc: The System sees your fatigue. Do one small kind thing IRL: a 10-minute walk, a screen-free comfort drink, or write three gratitudes. Return to hard quests without self-hate.
monarch_mode_active_banner: Monarch Mode is active: you crossed level 50. The System will now open the hardest trials.
awakening_scene_step0: The System has scanned your potential. The first gates are already open.
awakening_scene_step1_hint: Complete any of the three quests tagged «awakening».
awakening_scene_step2_hint: After your start, the System will open the story gates at level 10.
